creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Zsolt Udvari from comment #20)
Ugh. SO sorry. I've been away for awhile (2 deaths in the family)
and as result, forgot about this. I've just submitted a patch
that cleans up x11-wm/compiz. I'm going to wait for it to land.
Then begin to reconcile this here. Stay tuned... :)

Thanks for all your time and efforts on this, Samy!
